testcase.name: Playwright Special locators
testcase.failure:
CoursePlaywright\IIc.spec.js:3:5 › Playwright Special locators ───────────────────────────────────
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByLabel('Check me out if you Love IceCreams!') - locator resolved to <input type="checkbox" id="exampleCheck1" class="form-check-input"/> - attempting click action - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - performing click action
3 | test('Playwright Special locators', async ({page}) => { 4 | await page.goto("https://rahulshettyacademy.com/angularpractice/"); > 5 | await page.getByLabel("Check me out if you Love IceCreams!").click(); | ^ 6 | await page.getByLabel("Employed").check(); 7 | await page.getByLabel("Gender").selectOption("Female"); 8 | await page.getByPlaceholder("Password").fill("abc123"); at D:\2026 - Study\Playwright\Playwright-E2E\tests\CoursePlaywright\IIc.spec.js:5:66

testcase.name: Playwright Test level time out

failure.message: IIc.spec.js:22:5 Playwright Test level time out

testcase.failure:
CoursePlaywright\IIc.spec.js:22:5 › Playwright Test level time out ─────────────────────────────── Test timeout of 6000ms exceeded. Error: expect(locator).toHaveText(expected) failed Locator: locator('.my-4').first() Expected: "Shop" Received: "Shop Name" Call log: - Expect "toHaveText" with timeout 9000ms - waiting for locator('.my-4').first() 5 × locator resolved to

Shop Name

- unexpected value "Shop Name" 38 | //Global -> test -> step 39 | await page.getByRole("link", {name: "Shop"}).click({timeout:15000}); > 40 | await slowExpect(page.locator(".my-4").first()).toHaveText("Shop"); | ^ 41 | 42 | //2 more 43 | at D:\2026 - Study\Playwright\Playwright-E2E\tests\CoursePlaywright\IIc.spec.js:40:53 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\CoursePlaywright-IIc-Playwright-Test-level-time-out\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\CoursePlaywright-IIc-Playwright-Test-level-time-out\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\CoursePlaywright-IIc-Playwright-Test-level-time-out\error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\CoursePlaywright-IIc-Playwright-Test-level-time-out\trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ..\test-results\CoursePlaywright-IIc-Playwright-Test-level-time-out\trace.zip ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Browser Context Playwright test
testcase.failure:
CoursePlaywright\UIBasicstest.spec.js:4:1 › Browser Context Playwright test ──────────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed
Locator: locator('[style*=\'block\']') Expected substring: "Incorrect" Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[style*=\'block\']')
22 | //webdriverwait 23 | console.log(await page.locator("[style*='block']").textContent()); > 24 | await expect(page.locator("[style*='block']")).toContainText('Incorrect'); | ^ 25 | }); 26 | 27 | test('Page Playwright test', async ({page}) => { at D:\2026 - Study\Playwright\Playwright-E2E\tests\CoursePlaywright\UIBasicstest.spec.js:24:52
